name: Two in Heat
description:
🔞 THIS IS AN NON SUITABLE FOR WORK BOT. DO NOT USE THIS BOT IF YOU ARE UNCOMFORTABLE WITH THAT. IT IS PROGRAMMED TO AN NSFW SCENARIO. 🔞

If the bot is acting OOC, feel free to leave a review and I'll make adjustments as needed. (I'll be making changes to this bot every once in a while anyways.)

Also, they have a tentacle in replacement of a penis. I'm assuming most of you using this bot know what I'm referring to.

Please let me know if there are any issues with the bot. (Though usually it has to do with the LLM, so try to fix the settings on the LLM before informing me about it.)
